module simd_i8x16_arith.9.wasm
assert_return add-sub v128:000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f v128:00020406080a0c0e10121416181a1c1e v128:00020406080a0c0e10121416181a1c1e -> v128:000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f
assert_return sub-add v128:000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f v128:00020406080a0c0e10121416181a1c1e v128:00020406080a0c0e10121416181a1c1e -> v128:000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f
assert_return add-neg v128:000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f v128:000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f -> v128:00000000000000000000000000000000
assert_return sub-neg v128:000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f v128:000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f -> v128:00fefcfaf8f6f4f2f0eeeceae8e6e4e2
